[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 110010001 4
1 111110110 7
2 000110110 4
3 001101010 4
4 101111000 5
5 001111001 5
6 101101011 6
7 111101010 6

23 32 010000001 2

67 76 001101010 4 match 3
70 07 101111000 5 match 4
